raw_response:
Variant B is substantially more useful as an operator. While both reports correctly identify my premium market position and the role of portion size in justifying price, Variant B provides a critical, actionable insight that Variant A misses entirely: the "Lunch Market Gap." By highlighting my 1:00 PM opening time against competitors who open at 11 AM or 12 PM, it pinpoints a significant, untapped revenue stream. The specific intelligence on Chinese Wok's "30% off" promotion on Pyszne.pl is the kind of tactical detail I can act on immediately. Variant A validates my current strategy, which is useful, but Variant B gives me a concrete plan to grow my business this week by adjusting operating hours to capture the early lunch crowd. It offers not just analysis, but a clear operational directive.

```json
{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://wolt.com", "https://pyszne.pl", "https://trojmiasto.pl"]}
```
